# nxos_ttag (Resource)

This resource can manage the PTP ttag configuration on NX-OS devices, including per-interface ttag settings for underlay and overlay traffic.

### API Documentation

- [ttagTtagEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Interfaces/ttag:TtagEntity/)
- [ttagTtagIf](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Interfaces/ttag:TtagIf/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nxos_ttag" "example" {
  ttag_marker_interval = 120
  ttag_interfaces = {
    "eth1/10" = {
      ttag        = true
      ttag_inner  = false
      ttag_marker = false
      ttag_strip  = false
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `ttag_interfaces` (Attributes Map) Per-interface PTP ttag configuration and management.
  - Map key: `interface_id` - Interface id of port with PTP configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ttag_interfaces))
- `ttag_marker_interval` (Number) PTP ttag marker interval in seconds.
  - Range: `1`-`25200`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--ttag_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ttag_interfaces`

Optional:

- `ttag` (Boolean) TTAG header for underlay traffic (outer) on interface.
- `ttag_inner` (Boolean) TTAG header for overlay traffic (inner) on interface.
- `ttag_marker` (Boolean) Ttag marker packet on interface.
- `ttag_strip` (Boolean) Strip ttag from egress packet on this interface.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to       = nxos_ttag.example
  identity = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema


#### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = nxos_ttag.example
  id = ""
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nxos_ttag.example ""
```
